name: GPT Live 1
description: GPT Live 1 is OpenAI's new full-duplex voice model for ChatGPT Voice. It can listen and speak at the same time, handle interruptions and pauses more naturally, and delegate web search, deeper reasoning, or more complex work to frontier models in the background.

details.name: availability
details.value: Rolling out globally to ChatGPT Voice on web, iOS, and Android for Go, Plus, and Pro users.

details.name: api_availability
details.value: OpenAI says GPT-Live will come to the API soon, but has not published general API availability, pricing, or stable API model documentation.

details.name: architecture
details.value: Full-duplex continuous interaction, allowing the model to listen and speak at the same time instead of waiting for fixed turn boundaries.

details.name: background_delegation
details.value: Delegates questions requiring web search, deeper reasoning, or complex work to GPT-5.5 at launch while GPT-Live maintains conversational flow.

details.name: instant_backend
details.value: GPT-Live-1 Instant uses GPT-5.5 Instant in the background.

details.name: medium_high_backend
details.value: GPT-Live-1 Medium and High use GPT-5.5 Thinking with medium and high reasoning effort.

details.name: chatgpt_capabilities
details.value: Supports natural back-and-forth voice conversation, interruptions, pauses, web search, memory, visual result cards, text input, and image input in the same chat where available.

details.name: evaluation_summary
details.value: OpenAI reports GPT-Live-1 and GPT-Live-1 mini were strongly preferred over Advanced Voice Mode in matched 5-10 minute human preference conversations; GPT-Live-1 also showed gains on GPQA, BrowseComp, and an internal Tau3-Voice Telecom evaluation.

details.name: training_data
details.value: OpenAI says GPT-Live-1 and GPT-Live-1 mini were trained on diverse datasets including public internet information, third-party partner data, and information provided or generated by users, human trainers, and researchers, with filtering to reduce personal information and mitigate risks.

details.name: safety_summary
details.value: OpenAI reports dedicated voice-native safety evaluations, red teaming, real-time input and output checks, spoken safety messages, support resources, and high-risk call-ending safeguards.

details.name: preparedness_framework
details.value: OpenAI's Safety Advisory Group determined that neither GPT-Live-1 nor GPT-Live-1 mini, when operating without delegation, could plausibly be High in the tracked Biological and Chemical, AI Self-Improvement, or Cybersecurity categories.

details.name: chatgpt_limitations
details.value: Does not support video, screen sharing, connected apps, plugins, Temporary Chats, the ChatGPT desktop app, Work, Codex, custom GPTs, or Business, Enterprise, and Edu workspaces at launch.

details.name: pricing_status
details.value: API pricing has not been published.

page_notice.markdown: GPT Live 1 is available in ChatGPT Voice, but OpenAI has not yet published general API availability, stable API documentation, or API pricing. This entry tracks the ChatGPT rollout and will need provider pricing once OpenAI ships API access.
